args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%'
ORDER BY artist, album, year
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%'
ORDER BY artist, album, year
LIMIT 200;

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%'
ORDER BY title
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%'
ORDER BY title
LIMIT 200;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080, 13758)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080, 13758)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
